name: transfer
title: Fast Transfer
description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable cross chain transfer.

meta.deprecationMessage: Fast Transfer is deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "send" for new integrations.

docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "send" for new integrations.
